content.en:
Ye Tian used the forbidden talent to hide, and easily passed through the patrol of the Forbidden Zerg along the way, approaching the Forbidden Zerg lair.

Here, there are still two lord-level forbidden zerg guarding the forbidden zerg lair.

Ye Tian did not approach them, but approached the forbidden zerg nest from the other direction, so that it would not be easy to be discovered by the lord-level forbidden zerg.

The passage is getting closer.

"Come in!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

At this moment, he had already walked to a passage in the Forbidden Zerg Lair and slowly flew into the inside of the Forbidden Zerg Lair.

Due to being in a state of forbidden talent concealment, none of the forbidden zergs found Ye Tian's traces.

Soon, Ye Tian easily entered the inside of the forbidden zerg lair.

This time, Ye Tian didn't get close to the Forbidden Insect Tree, because there was no need, after all, he had already been there last time, even if he went again, he could only confirm whether the Forbidden Insect Tree had given birth to a new lord-level Forbidden Zerg, which was not very meaningful.

So, he wanted to go and take a look at the rest of the Forbidden Zerg Lair.

The space inside the Forbidden Zerg Lair is very large, and when Ye Tian first came, he almost went straight to the core area inside the Forbidden Zerg Lair, and did not go to other places, but this time he found a lot of wonderful places.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to discover a vein.

The vein appears to be connected to a vortex from which much material is spreading and merging into the vein.

Ye Tian landed on this vein and carefully identified the material of the vein.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian had a guess in his heart.

This vein is black-gold, extremely strong, even he is difficult to destroy, almost impossible to refine, and has a powerful anti-shock effect, but it is perfectly integrated with the power of forbidden rules.

This property is in keeping with a special substance he knows of—dark blunt gold!

Dark Blunt Gold is a very suitable ingredient for crafting forbidden weapons, and even more so than forbidden curiosities.

Ordinary forbidden strange things or forbidden strange things created by forbidden treasures, although they are terrifying, they are easy to be broken, for example, the forbidden strange things of the Emperor Fengyang were interrupted by him.

However, if it is a forbidden strange object made of dark blunt gold, it has the nature of not being destroyed, unless it encounters a half-step domain ancestor or domain ancestor-level powerhouse whose strength far exceeds his own, and the difference in strength between the two sides is too great, it may be interrupted.

But this situation is too rare, generally Dao Ancestor Zhen is holding a forbidden weapon made of dark blunt gold, if he really encounters that kind of situation, I am afraid that he will be killed directly, and the enemy will not attack his forbidden weapon.

In short, the value of dark blunt gold is very high, and there is dark blunt gold in the resource exchange list of Black Wind Mountain, but it is very rare, and it can only be exchanged for a few grains, which is not enough to create a forbidden weapon, so you can only add a few grains of dark blunt gold when creating a forbidden weapon.

However, this is a dark vein of blunt gold!

Ye Tian was very excited, but he calmed down.

"Don't be in a hurry, this vein is too big, it is estimated that the part that cannot be consumed after refining various forbidden treasures in the Forbidden Zerg Lair has been condensed here, forming a dark blunt gold vein. If I reveal my whereabouts, I will die, and I will not be able to take this dark blunt gold vein with me!" Ye Tian muttered.

Therefore, he had to be careful and careful not to cause any fluctuations when he took away this dark blunt gold vein, otherwise he would be easily discovered by the Forbidden Zerg inside the Forbidden Zerg's lair.

"Let's see if we can shake this dark blunt gold vein!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

When his power enveloped this vein, he wanted to take it into his inner world, only to find that it had caused a whirlpool to vibrate, which caused the entire forbidden zerg nest to tremble slightly.

Swish!

Ye Tian left quickly, not daring to stay here.

Not long after, a commander-level forbidden zerg came here, took a look at the pile of garbage, didn't care at all, and left here.

In its opinion, the clansmen do not touch the garbage, and it is estimated that the nest will only shake if there is a little problem.

It's not very intelligent, but I didn't expect that it was an outsider who moved this pile of garbage.

......

"It's so dangerous, I almost found out!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He also understood that with his own strength, he might not be able to take away the dark blunt gold vein, so he could only wait for the future to find a way.

Then, he went to the rest of the Forbidden Zerg lair.

"Is that the Forbidden Continent Fragment?"

During Ye Tian's flight, he saw a black continent, crooked and suspended in the void, it was very broken, if it weren't for the faint traces of some buildings on it, he couldn't even imagine that it was a fragment of the forbidden continent.

According to Ye Tian's guess, this continent fragment is very likely to be a domain boundary fragment, which fell into the Dark Forbidden Domain and turned into the Forbidden Continent, and was dragged into the Forbidden Zerg lair by these Forbidden Zergs.

Ye Tian stepped into this piece of forbidden continent fragments, searched around, and really found a few sect ruins, and found some inheritances, but they were all inheritances of low value, and they were of little use to him.

After a lot of time passed, Ye Tian suddenly sensed the power of the extremely powerful forbidden rules.

So, he immediately flew over and saw a stone tablet.

"This is a natural forbidden stone tablet from the Dark Forbidden Realm!"

Ye Tian looked at the one-person-high taboo stone tablet and secretly exclaimed.

This is different from the Forbidden Stone Tablet of Black Wind Mountain, the Forbidden Stone Tablet of Black Wind Mountain is strictly a forged Forbidden Stone Tablet, and it is a half-step domain ancestor who engraved his perception of the Forbidden Dao.

But what I realized was incomplete after all, and it couldn't be compared with the forbidden dao that naturally existed in the dark forbidden realm.

For example, Ouyang Jiu'er gave Ye Tian a fragment of a forbidden stone tablet, which was the real natural forbidden stone tablet, although it was only a small piece, but the value was extremely high.

And the taboo stele in front of him is even more precious, it is a complete taboo stele, containing a complete taboo dao, and the taboo dao contained is extremely powerful, even for the half-step domain ancestors, it is also a supreme treasure, enough to cause the half-step domain ancestors to fight.

What made Ye Tian's heart even more excited was that this forbidden stone tablet was thrown here by the forbidden zergs, and there were a large number of waste items around.

Obviously, the Forbidden Zerg continued to plunder all kinds of resources in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and found this Forbidden Stone Tablet and brought it back, and found that it was not helpful for cultivating the Forbidden Zerg, and it did not contain any energy, so it was thrown here as a discarded thing.

There is no way, the Forbidden Zerg does not cultivate, and does not participate in the Forbidden Dao, so they do not understand the value of this Forbidden Stone Tablet.

"It's not connected to the Forbidden Zerg Lair, I can take it completely!"

Ye Tian stepped forward, waved his hand, and incorporated the Forbidden Stone Tablet into the inner world.
